title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Tama, Usopp, Nami as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was getting sick of chasing that Komainu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's quickness was a real pain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh, did you break some bones?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Good! Now hurry up and die!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Nami, get Tama! We've gotta run!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, brat! Did you just put your mitts on my friend?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y-You did the same thing to my little brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami?! We're meant to be trying to escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can I run from someone that raises a hand against a child?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to beat this woman to a pulp!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 24 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
